prompt: Write four absurd but coherent sentences in the voice of a confused medieval chronicler who has been hired to document the Q3 results of a modern SaaS company.
response: Verily, in this quarter past, the sorcerers of Sales didst conjure forth a multitude of gold coins, exceeding by far the prophecies of the soothsayers. The alchemists of Product, too, didst transmute base code into gleaming features, though their arcane arts remain beyond the ken of mortal men. Alas, the dragon of Customer Churn hath grown fat upon the dissatisfaction of the realm's subjects, and its fiery breath doth threaten to consume all in its path. Yet, the wise men of the company assure us that, by the grace of the gods of Venture Capital, the kingdom shall endure and prosper in the quarters yet to come.
